name: Mika
description:
Lamenting the worsening of his eyesight as he grows older day after day, he is the surrogate parent gently overseeing his problematic employees.

Ohagi mochi and coffee, Japanese clothing and a café. It’s all about expressing a mix of Japanese and Western styles. He is the manager of the café with a traditional Japanese twist, "Café LycoReco”.

~!In episode 7 of the anime, it is revealed that Mika is gay.!~
